content: SqliteStorage requires better-sqlite3 native addon to be built before vitest can run — pnpm install does not auto-build it in restricted envs; run 'npm run build-release' in node_modules/.pnpm/better-sqlite3*/node_modules/better-sqlite3 to compile, or add 'onlyBuiltDependencies[]=better-sqlite3' to .npmrc

name: roles-workflows-injection
description: SqliteStorage uses roles/workflows as in-memory arrays injected via constructor options — storage.listRoles() and storage.listWorkflows() are read-only views; inject BUILT_IN_ROLES from @sisu/core or RoleRegistry.listRoles() result at construction time

content: getPlanByWorkItem(workItemId): returns most recent execution plan for a work item via ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1; returns null when no plan exists

PostgresStorage constructor takes a Pool instance (not connection string); static runMigrations(pool) reads 0001-0006 .sql files from src/storage/migrations/ via import.meta.url resolution, tracks applied in sisu_migrations table

PostgreSQL row mapping: JSONB columns return parsed JS objects (no JSON.parse needed), BOOLEAN returns true/false, TIMESTAMPTZ returns Date objects (use .toISOString() for conversion). JSONB insert params must use JSON.stringify().

name: postgres-transaction-pattern
description: PostgresStorage transactions: use client = await pool.connect(), BEGIN/COMMIT/ROLLBACK pattern for createPlan and updatePlanStep multi-statement ops; always client.release() in finally block
